related.outgoing: Loose semantic connection — context shared, no dependency.
related.incoming: Other documents that mark this one as related context.

supersedes.outgoing: This document replaces the linked documents.
supersedes.incoming: Documents that replace this one (this one is superseded).

replacedBy.outgoing: The linked documents replace this one.

decidedBy.incoming: Documents driven by the decision recorded here.

dependsOn.incoming: Documents that depend on this one.

validates.outgoing: Documents this one validates (e.g. tests/specs verify decisions).

references.outgoing: External URLs cited from this document.
